MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff All Hallows Preservation, LP is present. Represented by Sherene Jackson.
Attorney Jane L. Creason appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mark Banks, Kim Banks and Brooke Washington are present.
Attorney Eugenia Amador representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May-7-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
